notes: Solid structure with clean separation (Logger, Metrics, validators, parsers) and good error handling patterns (try-catch around I/O, graceful degradation, signal handlers, metrics tracking). However, security gaps include missing path traversal protection on env-var-controlled directories, no symlink checking, and incomplete HTML escaping (URL attributes unescaped while only title gets entity-escaped). The frontmatter parser is fragile: comma-detection for arrays will split legitimate values like 'Hello, world', and boolean/number coercion is applied after array conversion causing potential TypeError on .toLowerCase() of arrays. createdAt uses processing time instead of file mtime, making sort-by-date meaningless. randomUUID for document IDs makes output non-deterministic/non-reproducible. No CLI argument parsing (--help, --version) despite being a CLI tool. Duplicate word entries in search index (no deduplication). Empty body yields wordCount=1. No circular symlink protection risks infinite recursion.
